OCLEAN_SERVICE.name: Oclean Main Service
OCLEAN_SERVICE.description: Primary Oclean toothbrush command and notify channel (bb85/bb86)

SVC_DG.name: Oclean DG Service
SVC_DG.description: Optional data-gateway service on Y3/Y3L-class models

OCLEAN_WRITE.name: Oclean Write (bb85)
OCLEAN_WRITE.description: Main command channel. Subscribe to OCLEAN_READ_NOTIFY first; write hex opcode (+ optional payload); read replies on notify.

structure.description: Big-endian command word, e.g. 0303 battery query, 030201 device info, 022201 pause
Optional trailing bytes for settings commands (0203 voice, 0216 language, etc.)

OCLEAN_READ_NOTIFY.name: Oclean Notify (bb86)
OCLEAN_READ_NOTIFY.description: Subscribe (CCCD 0x0100) before writing OCLEAN_WRITE. Query replies arrive as notifications: 0303 battery, 0302 device info (often 2 chunks on Y3L).

CHR_BRUSH_NOTIFY.name: Oclean Brush Notify (bb90)
CHR_BRUSH_NOTIFY.description: Brush history chunks and live brushing telemetry

BATTERY_SERVICE.name: Battery Service
BATTERY_SERVICE.description: Standard GATT battery service; optional read alongside 0303 query
